ListItem.Para: Landing gear is secured in the down position.
Airplane is dispatched in accordance with the AFM Landing Gear Extended Appendix.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Secure the landing gear in the down position (AMM DDG 32-31-07).

ListItem.Para: Install landing gear downlock pins (dispatch tool J32011) for airplane flight with landing gear locked in the extended position.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
MLG DOOR CTRL VLV OPEN-1
MLG DOOR CTRL VLV OPEN-2
LG LEVER LOCK
On the MISC SYSTEM CTRLS (MSC) maintenance page, set the Overspeed Warning switch to GEAR DOWN.
The airplane must be dispatched using the AFM Landing Gear Extended Appendix.
Determine flight planning information by selecting Gear Down Dispatch in the Boeing performance software.

Note.Para: The FMC does not support certain provisions for operations with the landing gear extended.

ListItem.Para: VMO GEAR DOWN memo message will be displayed.
RVSM operations is not allowed. The takeoff speeds and VREF obtained from the FMC are not valid for dispatch with the landing gear extended.
Nose landing gear bypass/auto-off valve pressure transducer is deactivated.
Nose landing gear bypass/auto-off valve is verified to operate normally.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the nose landing gear bypass/auto-off valve pressure transducer and verify that the nose landing gear bypass/auto-off valve is operating normally (AMM DDG 32-31-07).

ListItem.Para: Install landing gear downlock pins.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker NLG PRESS SNSR and lock with an INOP tag.
Gain access to the nose landing gear bypass/auto-off valve pressure transducer.
Disconnect, cap and stow the electrical connector for the nose landing gear bypass/auto-off valve pressure transducer.
Pressurize the center hydraulic system.
Confirm the landing gear doors are closed.
Use the Central Maintenance Computing Function (CMCF) to start the Initiated/Ground Test: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Operational, Landing Gear Actuation Bypass Valve Off.
When the test screen shows OPERATING, immediately set the landing gear lever UP.
Confirm the landing gear doors remain closed for at least 5 seconds.
When the test screen shows TEST COMPLETE, confirm the landing gear doors open.
Set the landing gear lever DN.
Close the landing gear doors.

Para.rev:revHighlight: Added the missing word "door" to title to align with the AMM.

ListItem.Para: Use the Central Maintenance Computing Function (CMCF) to start the SPECIAL FUNCTIONS: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Door Normal Close.
Confirm the landing gear doors are closed and door safety valves are in STOW.
On the LNDG GEAR INDN AND STRN maintenance page, confirm that the pressure for MLG SYS is approximately the same pressure as the CENTER SYS.
Use the ground door release system to open the landing gear doors.
On the LNDG GEAR INDN AND STRN maintenance page, confirm that the MLG SYS pressure decreases to less than 500 psi.
Set the landing gear control lever UP.
Confirm the landing gear doors are open.
Wait at least 10 seconds.
Set the landing gear control lever DN.
Confirm the landing gear doors close.
Confirm the GEAR CONTROL SYS status message is not displayed.
Press the STOP FUNCTION button on the CMCF SPECIAL FUNCTIONS screen: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Normal Close.
Depressurize the center hydraulic system.
Remove landing gear downlock pins.
Landing gear is secured in the down position.
Airplane is dispatched in accordance with the AFM Landing Gear Extended Appendix.

Note.Para: The auto speedbrake system will be inoperative. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 27-61-03.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Secure the landing gear in the down position (AMM DDG 32-31-07).

ListItem.Para: Install landing gear downlock pins (dispatch tool J32011) for airplane flight with landing gear locked in the extended position.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
MLG DOOR CTRL VLV OPEN-1
MLG DOOR CTRL VLV OPEN-2
LG LEVER LOCK

Note.Para: GEAR CONTROL SYS status message will be displayed. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 32-30- 01.

ListItem.Para: On the MISC SYSTEM CTRLS (MSC) maintenance page, set the Overspeed Warning switch to GEAR DOWN.
The airplane must be dispatched using the AFM Landing Gear Extended Appendix.
Determine flight planning information by selecting Gear Down Dispatch in the Boeing performance software.

Note.Para: The FMC does not support certain provisions for operations with the landing gear extended.

ListItem.Para: VMO GEAR DOWN memo message will be displayed.
RVSM operations is not allowed.
Main landing gear bypass/auto-off valve pressure transducer is deactivated.
Main landing gear bypass/auto-off valve is verified to operate normally.

Note.Para: The auto speedbrake system will be inoperative. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 27-61-03.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the main landing gear bypass/auto-off valve pressure transducer and verify that the main landing gear bypass/auto-off valve is operating normally (AMM DDG 32-31-07).

ListItem.Para: Install landing gear downlock pins.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker MLG PRESS SNSR and lock with an INOP tag.
Gain access to the main landing gear bypass/auto-off valve pressure transducer.
Disconnect, cap and stow the electrical connector for the main landing gear bypass/auto-off valve pressure transducer.
Pressurize the center hydraulic system.
Confirm the landing gear doors are closed.
Use the Central Maintenance Computing Function (CMCF) to start the Initiated/Ground Test: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Operational, Landing Gear Actuation Bypass Valve Off.
When the test screen shows OPERATING, immediately set the landing gear lever UP.
Confirm the landing gear doors remain closed for at least 5 seconds.
When the test screen shows TEST COMPLETE, confirm the landing gear doors open.
Set the landing gear lever DN.
Close the landing gear doors.

Para.rev:revHighlight: Added the missing word "door" to title to align with the AMM.

ListItem.Para: Use the Central Maintenance Computing Function (CMCF) to start the SPECIAL FUNCTIONS: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Door Normal Close.
Confirm the landing gear doors are closed and door safety valves are in STOW.
On the LNDG GEAR INDN AND STRN maintenance page, confirm that the pressure for NLG SYS is approximately the same pressure as the CENTER SYS.
Use the ground door release system to open the landing gear doors.
On the LNDG GEAR INDN AND STRN maintenance page, confirm that the NLG SYS pressure decreases to less than 500 psi.
Set the landing gear control lever UP.
Confirm the landing gear doors are open.
Wait at least 10 seconds.
Set the landing gear control lever DN.
Confirm the landing gear doors close.
Confirm the GEAR CONTROL SYS status message is not displayed.
Press the STOP FUNCTION button on the CMCF SPECIAL FUNCTIONS screen: 32 Landing Gear Actuation System, Landing Gear Actuation Allow Normal Close.
Depressurize the center hydraulic system.
Remove landing gear downlock pins.
